programmes.show_name: The Kenny Everett Naughty Joke Box
programmes.show_description: Kenny Everett presents a gaggle of rather naughty comedians live from Soho! The set includes Willie Rushton and Leslie Crowther doing hard-core comedy routines. Guaranteed to offend!
After a small-town carnival, teens are stalked by a hidden killer. As night falls, terror spreads and secrets surface, pushing survivors into a desperate fight to escape the chilling Death Screams!
